If you notice an issue, please consider making an edit, starting a discussion on the article's talk page, or reaching out via the [Arknights Terra Wiki Discord](https://discord.gg/2eXU4KHYpB). # Operator gallery: Rosmontis From Arknights Terra Wiki < [Rosmontis](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis "Rosmontis") [Jump to navigation](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery#mw-head) [Jump to search](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery#searchInput) | | | | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis "Rosmontis") | [File](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/File "Rosmontis/File") | [Story](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Story "Rosmontis/Story") | [Overview](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Overview "Rosmontis/Overview") | [Dialogue](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Dialogue "Rosmontis/Dialogue") | Gallery | [Trivia](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Trivia "Rosmontis/Trivia") | ## Contents - [1Skins](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery#Skins) - [2Outfits](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery#Outfits) - [3Sprites](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery#Sprites) - [4Miscellaneous](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery#Miscellaneous) - [4.1Promotional material](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery#Promotional_material) ## Skins\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery?action=edit§ion=1 "Edit section: Skins")\] | Base | | --- | | ![Rosmontis.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Rosmontis.png?76ef2f) | An outfit commonly worn by [Operators](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator "Operator").
While not as practical as a uniform, it's what they find most comfortable. | | Elite 2
Dynamic Art | | --- | | ![Rosmontis Elite 2.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Rosmontis_Elite_2.png?be752d) | An outfit that has been improved after the [Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator "Operator")'s [Promotion](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Promotion "Promotion").
Custom-made to suit each Operator's experiences and needs, these outfits are designed to provide them maximum flexibility on any battlefield. Furthermore, this is all done without compromising the comfort that they've come to expect. | ## Outfits\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery?action=edit§ion=2 "Edit section: Outfits")\] | Become Anew
Dynamic Art~~Outfit Voucher~~ | | --- | | ![Rosmontis Skin 1.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Rosmontis_Skin_1.png?7035b6) | One of Rosmontis's past lab outfits.
_Rosmontis longs to know what it was that all those machines held back in concert. She's seen it. She's forgotten it._
EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/Become Anew. Rosmontis's attire while still a test subject, adorned only by detectors and inhibitors.
**How to obtain:** [Il Siracusano](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Il_Siracusano "Il Siracusano"), [Lone Trail](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lone_Trail "Lone Trail"), [Zwillingstürme im Herbst](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Zwillingst%C3%BCrme_im_Herbst "Zwillingstürme im Herbst"), [Absolved Will Be the Seekers](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Absolved_Will_Be_the_Seekers "Absolved Will Be the Seekers"), [Ending a Grand Overture](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ending_a_Grand_Overture "Ending a Grand Overture"), [The Masses' Travels](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/The_Masses%27_Travels "The Masses' Travels") and [Retracing Our Steps](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Retracing_Our_Steps "Retracing Our Steps") ( [Outfit Store](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit_Store "Outfit Store"), 21 [![Originite Prime](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Originite_Prime_icon.png/20px-Originite_Prime_icon.png?83ccc8)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Originite_Prime "Originite Prime")) | | An Airy Dream
Dynamic Art~~Outfit Voucher~~ | | --- | | ![Rosmontis Skin 2.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Rosmontis_Skin_2.png?8b3b68) | One of Rosmontis's casual outfits.
_In her dream, Rosmontis struggled to recall how to play this game of chess, but she knew that no matter where her path led, the pieces around her would accompany her._
Test Collection Series/An Airy Dream. Rosmontis's lavender dream. In this dream, soft flowers bloom deep in her memories, and Rosmontis's skirt billows with the wind, leaping towards a light future with her companions.
**How to obtain:** [Wishes from Stars](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Wishes_from_Stars "Wishes from Stars") ( [Outfit Store](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit_Store "Outfit Store"), 21 [![Originite Prime](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Originite_Prime_icon.png/20px-Originite_Prime_icon.png?83ccc8)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Originite_Prime "Originite Prime")) | ## Sprites\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery?action=edit§ion=3 "Edit section: Sprites")\] - Rosmontis's Base Sprite - Rosmontis's _Become Anew_ Outfit Sprite ## Miscellaneous\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery?action=edit§ion=4 "Edit section: Miscellaneous")\] - [![Rosmontis without her Tactical Equipment](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Rosmontis_unarmed.png/200px-Rosmontis_unarmed.png?876056)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Rosmontis_unarmed.png "Rosmontis without her Tactical Equipment") Rosmontis without her Tactical Equipment - [![Rosmontis' official render from Arknights: Perish in Frost](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Rosmontis_Anime_Render.png/146px-Rosmontis_Anime_Render.png?701c43)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Rosmontis_Anime_Render.png "Rosmontis' official render from Arknights: Perish in Frost") Rosmontis' official render from _[Arknights: Perish in Frost](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights:_Perish_in_Frost "Arknights: Perish in Frost")_ ### Promotional material\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rosmontis/Gallery?action=edit§ion=5 "Edit section: Promotional material")\] -
